name: GH_BackgroundSettings
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.GUI.Theme.GH_BackgroundSettings.)

properties.name: Colour1
properties.summary: First background colour. Depending on the background style, this colour is used in different ways.

properties.name: Colour2
properties.summary: Second background colour. Depending on the background style, this colour is used in different ways.

properties.name: Hatch
properties.summary: Background hatch brush style. This property is only used if BackgroundStyle is set to GH_ThemeBackgroundStyle.Hatch.

properties.name: Style
properties.summary: Canvas monochromatic flag. If True, the canvas background is a solid colour.
